document.getElementById('mute-text-inline');\n349\t\n350\t  const icon = muted ? '🔇' : '🔊';\n351\t  const text = muted ? 'Unmute' : 'Mute';\n352\t\n353\t  if (muteBtn) {\n354\t    if (muted) {\n355\t      muteBtn.classList.add('muted');\n356\t    } else {\n357\t      muteBtn.classList.remove('muted');\n358\t    }\n359\t  }\n360\t  if (muteIcon) muteIcon.textContent = icon;\n361\t  if (muteText) muteText.textContent = text;\n362\t\n363\t  // Update inline controls\n364\t  if (muteBtnInline) {\n365\t    if (muted) {\n366\t      muteBtnInline.classList.add('muted');\n367\t    } else {\n368\t      muteBtnInline.classList.remove('muted');\n369\t    }\n370\t  }\n371\t  if (muteIconInline) muteIconInline.textContent = icon;\n372\t  if (muteTextInline) muteTextInline.textContent = text;\n373\t};\n374\t\n375\t// Update push-to-talk button UI (both main and inline)\n376\tconst updatePTTUI = (enabled) => {\n377\t  console.log('updatePTTUI called with enabled:', enabled);\n378\t  // Main controls\n379\t  const pttToggle = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle');\n380\t  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n381\t  const pttHint = document.querySelector('.ptt-hint');\n382\t  // Inline controls\n383\t  const pttToggleInline = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle-inline');\n384\t  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n385\t\n386\t  if (pttToggle) pttToggle.checked = enabled;\n387\t  if (pttToggleInline) pttToggleInline.checked = enabled;\n388\t\n389\t  // Main PTT button\n390\t  if (pttBtn) {\n391\t    if (enabled) {\n392\t      pttBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n393\t      pttBtn.style.display = 'flex';\n394\t    } else {\n395\t      pttBtn.classList.add('hidden');\n396\t      pttBtn.style.display = 'none';\n397\t    }\n398\t  }\n399\t\n400\t  // Inline PTT button\n401\t  if (pttBtnInline) {\n402\t    if (enabled) {\n403\t      pttBtnInline.classList.remove('hidden');\n404\t      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'flex';\n405\t    } else {\n406\t      pttBtnInline.classList.add('hidden');\n407\t      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'none';\n408\t    }\n409\t  }\n410\t\n411\t  // Show/hide the hint\n412\t  if (pttHint) {\n413\t    pttHint.style.display = enabled ? 'block' : 'none';\n414\t  }\n415\t};\n416\t\n417\t// Set microphone enabled state\n418\tconst setMicrophoneEnabled = (enabled) => {\n419\t  console.log('setMicrophoneEnabled called:', enabled, 'webRTC:', !!webRTC);\n420\t  if (webRTC) {\n421\t    console.log('webRTC.microphone:', webRTC.microphone);\n422\t    if (webRTC.microphone) {\n423\t      webRTC.microphone.enabled = enabled;\n424\t      console.log(`Microphone ${enabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'}`);\n425\t    } else {\n426\t      console.warn('webRTC.microphone not available');\n427\t    }\n428\t  }\n429\t};\n430\t\n431\t// Toggle mute state\n432\tconst toggleMute = () => {\n433\t  console.log('toggleMute clicked, webRTC:', !!webRTC, 'connectionStatus:', connectionStatus);\n434\t\n435\t  // Allow toggling state even without connection (will apply on connect)\n436\t  isMuted = !isMuted;\n437\t  updateMuteUI(isMuted);\n438\t  saveMuteState(isMuted);\n439\t  console.log(`Mute state toggled to: ${isMuted}`);\n440\t\n441\t  // Apply immediately if connected\n442\t  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n443\t    setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n444\t  }\n445\t};\n446\t\n447\t// Toggle push-to-talk mode\n448\tconst togglePushToTalk = () => {\n449\t  console.log('togglePushToTalk clicked, current state:', isPushToTalk);\n450\t\n451\t  isPushToTalk = !isPushToTalk;\n452\t  updatePTTUI(isPushToTalk);\n453\t  savePushToTalkState(isPushToTalk);\n454\t  console.log(`Push-to-talk mode toggled to: ${isPushToTalk}`);\n455\t\n456\t  // Apply immediately if connected\n457\t  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n458\t    if (isPushToTalk) {\n459\t      // Entering PTT mode - disable mic by default\n460\t      setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n461\t    } else {\n462\t      // Leaving PTT mode - restore based on mute state\n463\t      setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n464\t    }\n465\t  }\n466\t};\n467\t\n468\t// Push-to-talk button handlers\n469\tconst startTalking = () => {\n470\t  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n471\t\n472\t  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n473\t  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n474\t  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.add('active');\n475\t  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.add('active');\n476\t  setMicrophoneEnabled(true);\n477\t  console.log('PTT: Started talking');\n478\t};\n479\t\n480\tconst stopTalking = () => {\n481\t  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n482\t\n483\t  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n484\t  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n485\t  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.remove('active');\n486\t  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.remove('active');\n487\t  setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n488\t  console.log('PTT: Stopped talking');\n489\t};\n490\t\n491\t// Update layout based on chat history (desktop: show inline controls when has content)\n492\tconst updateLayoutMode = (hasHistory) => {\n493\t  const mainContent = document.querySelector('.main-content');\n494\t  if (mainContent) {\n495\t    if (hasHistory) {\n496\t      mainContent.classList.add('has-history');\n497\t    } else {\n498\t      mainContent.classList.remove('has-history');\n499\t    }\n500\t  }\n501\t};\n502\t\n503\t// Transcript display functions\n504\tconst showTranscript = () => {\n505\t  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n506\t  // Only show and switch layout when there's actual content (not empty placeholders)\n507\t  const hasVisibleContent = transcriptMessages.some(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming);\n508\t  if (card && hasVisibleContent) card.classList.add('visible');\n509\t  updateLayoutMode(hasVisibleContent);\n510\t};\n511\t\n512\tconst hideTranscript = () => {\n513\t  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n514\t  if (card) card.classList.remove('visible');\n515\t  updateLayoutMode(false);\n516\t};\n517\t\n518\tconst clearTranscript = () => {\n519\t  transcriptMessages = [];\n520\t  renderTranscript();\n521\t  updateLayoutMode(false);\n522\t};\n523\t\n524\t// Find message by itemId\n525\tconst findMessageByItemId = (itemId) => {\n526\t  return transcriptMessages.findIndex(msg => msg.itemId === itemId);\n527\t};\n528\t\n529\t// Create placeholder for conversation item (called when item is created - correct order)\n530\tconst createMessagePlaceholder = (itemId, role) => {\n531\t  // Check if already exists\n532\t  if (findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) return;\n533\t  transcriptMessages.push({\n534\t    itemId,\n535\t    role,\n536\t    content: '',\n537\t    timestamp: Date.now(),\n538\t    pending: true  // Mark as waiting for transcription\n539\t  });\n540\t  renderTranscript();\n541\t  showTranscript();\n542\t};\n543\t\n544\t// Update message content by itemId\n545\tconst updateMessageByItemId = (itemId, content, options = {}) => {\n546\t  const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n547\t  if (index !== -1) {\n548\t    transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n549\t    transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n550\t    if (options.streaming !== undefined) {\n551\t      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = options.streaming;\n552\t    }\n553\t    renderTranscript();\n554\t    showTranscript();\n555\t    return index;\n556\t  }\n557\t  return -1;\n558\t};\n559\t\n560\t// Format tool name for display\n561\tconst formatToolName = (name) => {\n562\t  const displayNames = {\n563\t    get_current_weather: 'Weather',\n564\t    web_search: 'Web Search',\n565\t    web_fetch: 'Fetch URL',\n566\t    voice_change: 'Voice Change',\n567\t    save_memory: 'Save Memory',\n568\t    recall_memories: 'Recall Memories'\n569\t  };\n570\t  return displayNames[name] || name.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\\b\\w/g, l => l.toUpperCase());\n571\t};\n572\t\n573\t// Add a tool call message to the transcript\n574\tconst addToolCallMessage = (name, args, callId) => {\n575\t  transcriptMessages.push({\n576\t    role: 'tool',\n577\t    type: 'tool_call',\n578\t    toolName: name,\n579\t    toolArgs: args,\n580\t    callId: callId,\n581\t    status: 'pending',\n582\t    result: null,\n583\t    timestamp: Date.now(),\n584\t    justAdded: true // Flag for initial animation\n585\t  });\n586\t  renderTranscript();\n587\t  showTranscript();\n588\t};\n589\t\n590\t// Legacy function for messages without itemId\n591\tconst addTranscriptMessage = (role, content, itemId = null) => {\n592\t  if (itemId) {\n593\t    const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n594\t    if (index !== -1) {\n595\t      // Update existing placeholder\n596\t      transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n597\t      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n598\t      renderTranscript();\n599\t      showTranscript();\n600\t      return;\n601\t    }\n602\t  }\n603\t  // Fallback: add new message\n604\t  transcriptMessages.push({ role, content, timestamp: Date.now(), itemId });\n605\t  renderTranscript();\n606\t  showTranscript();\n607\t};\n608\t\n609\t// Start a new streaming response (returns index)\n610\tconst startStreamingResponse = (role, itemId = null) => {\n611\t  let index;\n612\t  if (itemId) {\n613\t    index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n614\t    if (index !== -1) {\n615\t      // Use existing placeholder\n616\t      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = true;\n617\t      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n618\t    } else {\n619\t      // Create new with itemId\n620\t      index = transcriptMessages.length;\n621\t      transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true, itemId });\n622\t    }\n623\t  } else {\n624\t    index = transcriptMessages.length;\n625\t    transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true });\n626\t  }\n627\t  streamingResponse = { index, content: '', role, itemId };\n628\t  renderTranscript();\n629\t  showTranscript();\n630\t  return index;\n631\t};\n632\t\n633\t// Append to streaming response\n634\tconst appendToStreamingResponse = (delta) => {\n635\t  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n636\t  streamingResponse.content += delta;\n637\t  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = streamingResponse.content;\n638\t  renderTranscript(true); // Pass true to indicate streaming update\n639\t};\n640\t\n641\t// Finalize streaming response\n642\tconst finalizeStreamingResponse = (finalContent) => {\n643\t  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n644\t  // Use final content if provided, otherwise keep accumulated content\n645\t  if (finalContent) {\n646\t    transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = finalContent;\n647\t  }\n648\t  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].streaming = false;\n649\t  streamingResponse = null;\n650\t  renderTranscript();\n651\t};\n652\t\n653\tconst renderTranscript = (isStreamingUpdate = false) => {\n654\t  const container = document.getElementById('transcript-content');\n655\t  if (!container) return;\n656\t\n657\t  if (transcriptMessages.length === 0) {\n658\t    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n659\t    return;\n660\t  }\n661\t\n662\t  // For streaming updates, only update the streaming message's text (much faster)\n663\t  if (isStreamingUpdate && streamingResponse) {\n664\t    const streamingEl = container.querySelector(`[data-idx=\"${streamingResponse.index}\"] .transcript-text`);\n665\t    if (streamingEl) {\n666\t      const msg = transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index];\n667\t      let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n668\t      // Simple text for streaming - skip markdown parsing for performance\n669\t      contentHtml = contentHtml.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n670\t      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n671\t      streamingEl.innerHTML = contentHtml;\n672\t      container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n673\t      return;\n674\t    }\n675\t  }\n676\t\n677\t  // Full render for new messages or finalization\n678\t  // Filter out pending placeholders with no content (always include tool_call messages)\n679\t  const visibleMessages = transcriptMessages.filter(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming || msg.type === 'tool_call');\n680\t\n681\t  if (visibleMessages.length === 0) {\n682\t    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n683\t    return;\n684\t  }\n685\t\n686\t  const html = visibleMessages.map((msg, idx) => {\n687\t    // Tool call messages — collapsed by default, expand to see request + response\n688\t    if (msg.type === 'tool_call') {\n689\t      let argsFormatted = msg.toolArgs || '';\n690\t      try {\n691\t        argsFormatted = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(msg.toolArgs), null, 2);\n692\t      } catch (e) { /* keep raw */ }\n693\t\n694\t      const statusClass = msg.status === 'completed' ? 'completed' : 'pending';\n695\t\n696\t      // Tool-specific icons\n697\t      const toolIcons = {\n698\t        get_current_weather: '🌤️',\n699\t        web_search: '🔍',\n700\t        web_fetch: '📄',\n701\t        voice_change: '🎙️',\n702\t        save_memory: '💾',\n703\t        recall_memories: '🧠'\n704\t      };\n705\t      const toolIcon = toolIcons[msg.toolName] || '🔧';\n706\t\n707\t      // Format timestamp\n708\t      const time = new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n709\t\n710\t      // Response section inside the expandable body\n711\t      let resultHtml = '';\n712\t      if (msg.result) {\n713\t        resultHtml = `\n714\t          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n715\t            <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Response</div>\n716\t            <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${msg.result}</pre>\n717\t          </div>`;\n718\t      } else if (msg.status === 'pending') {\n719\t        resultHtml = `\n720\t          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n721\t            <span class=\"tool-call-loading\">Waiting for result...</span>\n722\t          </div>`;\n723\t      }\n724\t\n725\t      const justAdded = msg.justAdded ? 'data-just-added=\"true\"' : '';\n726\t      const justCompleted = msg.justCompleted ? 'data-just-completed=\"true\"' : '';\n727\t\n728\t      return `\n729\t        <div class=\"transcript-message tool-call\" data-idx=\"${idx}\" ${justAdded} ${justCompleted}>\n730\t          <details class=\"tool-call-details\" ${msg.justAdded ? 'open' : ''}>\n731\t            <summary class=\"tool-call-summary\">\n732\t              <span class=\"tool-call-icon ${msg.toolName}\">${toolIcon}</span>\n733\t              <span class=\"tool-call-name\">${formatToolName(msg.toolName)}</span>\n734\t              <span class=\"tool-call-timestamp\">${time}</span>\n735\t              <span class=\"tool-call-status ${statusClass}\">${msg.status}</span>\n736\t            </summary>\n737\t            <div class=\"tool-call-body\">\n738\t              <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n739\t                <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Request</div>\n740\t                <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${argsFormatted}</pre>\n741\t              </div>\n742\t              ${resultHtml}\n743\t            </div>\n744\t          </details>\n745\t        </div>\n746\t      `;\n747\t    }\n748\t\n749\t    const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'system' : 'assistant';\n750\t    const roleLabel = msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'System' : 'DUCK-E';\n751\t    const streamingClass = msg.streaming ? ' streaming' : '';\n752\t\n753\t    // Parse markdown if marked is available (skip for empty streaming)\n754\t    let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n755\t    if (contentHtml && typeof marked !== 'undefined' && !msg.streaming) {\n756\t      try {\n757\t        contentHtml = marked.parse(msg.content);\n758\t      } catch (e) {\n759\t        console.warn('Markdown parsing failed:', e);\n760\t        contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n761\t      }\n762\t    } else if (contentHtml) {\n763\t      contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n764\t    }\n765\t\n766\t    // Show cursor for streaming messages\n767\t    if (msg.streaming) {\n768\t      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n769\t    }\n770\t\n771\t    return `\n772\t      <div class=\"transcript-message ${roleClass}${streamingClass}\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n773\t        <div class=\"transcript-label\">${roleLabel}</div>\n774\t        <div class=\"transcript-text\">${contentHtml}</div>\n775\t      </div>\n776\t    `;\n777\t  }).join('');\n778\t\n779\t  container.innerHTML = html;\n780\t\n781\t  // Auto-scroll to bottom\n782\t  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n783\t};\n784\t\n785\t// Handle incoming messages from WebRTC for transcript\n786\tconst handleWebRTCMessage = (event) => {\n787\t  try {\n788\t    // event now has { data: string, message: object } from our modified ag2client\n789\t    const data = event.message || (typeof event.data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(event.data) : event.data);\n790\t\n791\t    // Perf telemetry hooks\n792\t    if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_started') {\n793\t      perfReset();\n794\t      perfTimeline.speechStarted = perfTs();\n795\t      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_started ts=${perfTimeline.speechStarted.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n796\t    } else if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped') {\n797\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n798\t        perfTimeline.speechStopped = perfTs();\n799\t        const delta = perfTimeline.speechStopped - (perfTimeline.speechStarted ?? perfTimeline.speechStopped);\n800\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_stopped  speech_dur=${delta.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n801\t      }\n802\t    } else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n803\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n804\t        perfTimeline.transcriptionDone = perfTs();\n805\t        const start = perfTimeline.speechStopped ?? perfTimeline.speechStarted;\n806\t        const delta = start != null ? perfTimeline.transcriptionDone - start : null;\n807\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] transcription_done  transcription_dur=${delta != null ? delta.toFixed(0) : '?'}ms`);\n808\t      }\n809\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.created') {\n810\t      if (!perfTimeline) perfReset();\n811\t      perfTimeline.responseCreated = perfTs();\n812\t      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] response.created ts=${perfTimeline.responseCreated.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n813\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n814\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n815\t        const callId = data.call_id;\n816\t        perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId] = { name: data.name, dispatched: perfTs(), resultReceived: null };\n817\t        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_dispatched  tool=${data.name} call_id=${callId}`);\n818\t      }\n819\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n820\t      if (perfTimeline && data.item?.type === 'function_call') {\n821\t        const callId = data.item.call_id;\n822\t        if (perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId]) {\n823\t          perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived = perfTs();\n824\t          const dur = perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived - perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].dispatched;\n825\t          console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_result_received  tool=${data.item.name} call_id=${callId} dur=${dur.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n826\t        }\n827\t      }\n828\t    } else if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n829\t      if (perfTimeline) {\n830\t        perfTimeline.responseDone = perfTs();\n831\t        perfLogSummary();\n832\t      }\n833\t    }\n834\t\n835\t    // Log message types for debugging (can be removed later)\n836\t    if (data.type) {\n837\t      console.log('WebRTC message type:', data.type);\n838\t    }\n839\t\n840\t    // Handle different message types from OpenAI Realtime API\n841\t\n842\t    // Conversation item created - create placeholder in correct order\n843\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'conversation.item.added'; older models use 'conversation.item.created'\n844\t    if (data.type === 'conversation.item.created' || data.type === 'conversation.item.added') {\n845\t      const item = data.item;\n846\t      if (item && item.id && item.role) {\n847\t        console.log('Conversation item created:', item.id, item.role);\n848\t        createMessagePlaceholder(item.id, item.role);\n849\t      }\n850\t    }\n851\t    // User's speech transcription completed - update placeholder by item_id\n852\t    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n853\t      if (data.transcript) {\n854\t        const itemId = data.item_id;\n855\t        console.log('User transcript:', data.transcript, 'itemId:', itemId);\n856\t        currentTurnUserTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n857\t        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = ''; // Reset assistant side for new turn\n858\t        if (itemId && findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) {\n859\t          updateMessageByItemId(itemId, data.transcript);\n860\t        } else {\n861\t          // Fallback if no placeholder exists\n862\t          addTranscriptMessage('user', data.transcript, itemId);\n863\t        }\n864\t      }\n865\t    }\n866\t    // Assistant's audio response transcript DELTA (streaming)\n867\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.delta'\n868\t    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.delta' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta') {\n869\t      if (data.delta) {\n870\t        const itemId = data.item_id;\n871\t        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n872\t        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'audio_transcript' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n873\t          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n874\t          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'audio_transcript';\n875\t        }\n876\t        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n877\t      }\n878\t    }\n879\t    // Assistant's audio response transcript completed\n880\t    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.done'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.done'\n881\t    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.done' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.done') {\n882\t      const itemId = data.item_id;\n883\t      if (data.transcript) {\n884\t        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n885\t      }\n886\t      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'audio_transcript') {\n887\t        // 'duck-e-ptt'\n};\n\n// Cost tracking state (gpt-realtime-2 + backend APIs)\nlet sessionCost = {\n  startTime: null,\n  totalInputTextTokens: 0,\n  totalInputAudioTokens: 0,\n  totalOutputTextTokens: 0,\n  totalOutputAudioTokens: 0,\n  totalCachedTokens: 0,\n  backendInputTokens: 0,   // gpt-5.4-nano (web_search, memory extraction)\n  backendOutputTokens: 0,\n};\n\n// Pricing constants for gpt-realtime-2 (per token)\nconst PRICING = {\n  textInput:     4.00 / 1_000_000,\n  textOutput:   16.00 / 1_000_000,\n  audioInput:   32.00 / 1_000_000,\n  audioOutput:  64.00 / 1_000_000,\n  cachedInput:   0.40 / 1_000_000,\n  // gpt-5.4-nano (web_search, memory extraction)\n  backendInput:  0.20 / 1_000_000,\n  backendOutput: 1.25 / 1_000_000,\n};\n\nconst refreshCostDisplay = () => {\n  if (!sessionCost.startTime) return;\n\n  const backendCost =\n    (sessionCost.backendInputTokens  * PRICING.backendInput)  +\n    (sessionCost.backendOutputTokens * PRICING.backendOutput);\n\n  const totalCost =\n    (sessionCost.totalInputTextTokens   * PRICING.textInput)   +\n    (sessionCost.totalInputAudioTokens  * PRICING.audioInput)  +\n    (sessionCost.totalOutputTextTokens  * PRICING.textOutput)  +\n    (sessionCost.totalOutputAudioTokens * PRICING.audioOutput) +\n    (sessionCost.totalCachedTokens      * PRICING.cachedInput) +\n    backendCost;\n\n  const elapsedMs = Date.now() - sessionCost.startTime;\n  const elapsedHours = elapsedMs / 3_600_000;\n  const hourlyRate = elapsedHours > 0 ? totalCost / elapsedHours : 0;\n\n  const costs = {\n    audioInput:  sessionCost.totalInputAudioTokens  * PRICING.audioInput,\n    audioOutput: sessionCost.totalOutputAudioTokens * PRICING.audioOutput,\n    textInput:   sessionCost.totalInputTextTokens   * PRICING.textInput,\n    textOutput:  sessionCost.totalOutputTextTokens  * PRICING.textOutput,\n    cached:      sessionCost.totalCachedTokens      * PRICING.cachedInput,\n    backend:     backendCost,\n  };\n\n  updateCostDisplay(totalCost, hourlyRate, costs, elapsedMs);\n};\n\nconst updateCostFromResponse = (usage) => {\n  if (!sessionCost.startTime) sessionCost.startTime = sessionCost.totalInputAudioTokens   += details.audio_tokens   || 0;\n  sessionCost.totalCachedTokens       += details.cached_tokens  || 0;\n  sessionCost.totalOutputTextTokens   += outDetails.text_tokens  || 0;\n  sessionCost.totalOutputAudioTokens  += outDetails.audio_tokens || 0;\n\n  refreshCostDisplay();\n};\n\nlet costPanelListenerAttached = false;\n\n// Reset cost tracking state (call on reconnect)\nconst resetCostState = () => {\n  sessionCost = {\n    startTime: null,\n    totalInputTextTokens: 0,\n    totalInputAudioTokens: 0,\n    totalOutputTextTokens: 0,\n    totalOutputAudioTokens: 0,\n    totalCachedTokens: 0,\n    backendInputTokens: 0,\n    backendOutputTokens: 0,\n  };\n  const panel = document.getElementById('cost-panel');\n  const el = document.getElementById('cost-display');\n  if (panel) panel.style.display = 'none';\n  if (el) el.style.display = 'none';\n};\n\nconst updateCostDisplay = (totalCost, hourlyRate, costs, elapsedMs) => {\n  const el = document.getElementById('cost-display');\n  const panel = document.getElementById('cost-panel');\n  if (!el || !panel) return;\n  el.style.display = 'block';\n  panel.style.display = 'block';\n\n  const fmt = (v) => '$' + v.toFixed(2);\n  const mins = Math.floor(elapsedMs / 60000);\n  const secs = Math.floor((elapsedMs % 60000) / 1000);\n  const duration = `${mins}m ${secs.toString().padStart(2, '0')}s`;\n\n  el.innerHTML = `<button class=\"ducke-btn ducke-btn--xs\">Est. ~${fmt(hourlyRate)}/hr</button>`;\n\n  if (!costPanelListenerAttached) {\n    el.addEventListener('click', () => panel.classList.toggle('open'));\n    costPanelListenerAttached = true;\n  }\n\n  panel.innerHTML = `\n    <div class=\"cost-breakdown\">\n      <div class=\"cost-summary-row\">\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Duration</span><span>${duration}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Session Total</span><span>${fmt(totalCost)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Model</span><span class=\"cost-val\" style=\"font-family:'Fira Code',monospace;font-size:0.75em\">${typeof APP_MODEL !== 'undefined' ? APP_MODEL : ''}</span></div>\n      </div>\n      <hr class=\"cost-divider\">\n      <div class=\"cost-grid\">\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Audio In</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.audioInput)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Audio Out</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.audioOutput)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Text In</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.textInput)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Text Out</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.textOutput)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Cached</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.cached)}</span></div>\n        <div class=\"cost-item\"><span>Backend</span><span class=\"cost-val\">${fmt(costs.backend)}</span></div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  `;\n\n  // Brief flash to indicate update\n  el.classList.remove('cost-flash');\n  void el.offsetWidth; // reflow to restart animation\n  el.classList.add('cost-flash');\n};\n\n// Performance timeline tracking\nlet perfTimeline = null;\n\nconst perfReset = () => {\n  perfTimeline = {\n    speechStarted: null,\n    speechStopped: null,\n    transcriptionDone: null,\n    responseCreated: null,\n    // tool calls: map from call_id -> { dispatched, resultReceived }\n    toolCalls: {},\n    responseDone: null,\n  };\n};\n\nconst perfTs = () => performance.now();\n\nconst perfLogSummary = () => {\n  if (!perfTimeline) return;\n  const p = perfTimeline;\n  const fmt = (ms) => ms != null ? (ms / 1000).toFixed(2) + 's' : '?';\n  const delta = (a, b) => (a != null && b != null) ? b - a : null;\n\n  const speechDur = delta(p.speechStarted, p.speechStopped);\n  const transcriptionDur = delta(p.speechStopped, p.transcriptionDone);\n  const thinkingDur = delta(p.transcriptionDone ?? p.speechStopped, p.responseCreated);\n\n  const toolSummaries = Object.entries(p.toolCalls).map(([id, tc]) => {\n    const dur = delta(tc.dispatched, tc.resultReceived);\n    return `tool_call(${tc.name ?? id}): ${fmt(dur)}`;\n  });\n\n  const responseDur = (() => {\n    const afterTools = Object.values(p.toolCalls).map(tc => tc.resultReceived).filter(Boolean);\n    const start = afterTools.length > 0 ? Math.max(...afterTools) : p.responseCreated;\n    return delta(start, p.responseDone);\n  })();\n\n  const total = delta(p.speechStarted ?? p.responseCreated, p.responseDone);\n\n  const parts = [\n    `speech: ${fmt(speechDur)}`,\n    `transcription: ${fmt(transcriptionDur)}`,\n    `thinking: ${fmt(thinkingDur)}`,\n    ...toolSummaries,\n    `response: ${fmt(responseDur)}`,\n    `total: ${fmt(total)}`,\n  ];\n  console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] ${parts.join(', ')}`);\n};\n\n// Configure marked for safe rendering\nif (typeof marked !== 'undefined') {\n  marked.setOptions({\n    breaks: true,  // Convert \\n to <br>\n    gfm: true,     // GitHub Flavored Markdown\n    sanitize: false // We trust the content from our backend\n  });\n}\n\n// Load mute state from localStorage\nconst loadMuteState = () => {\n  const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.Muted);\n  return saved === 'true';\n};\n\n// Save mute state to localStorage\nconst saveMuteState = (muted) => {\n  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.Muted, muted.toString());\n};\n\n// Load push-to-talk state from localStorage\nconst loadPushToTalkState = () => {\n  const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.PTT);\n  return saved === 'true';\n};\n\n// Save push-to-talk state to localStorage\nconst savePushToTalkState = (enabled) => {\n  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.PTT, enabled.toString());\n};\n\n// OAuth Functions\n\n// Load OAuth state from localStorage\nconst loadOAuthState = () => {\n  try {\n    const token = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.TOKEN);\n    const userInfoStr = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_INFO);\n    if (token && userInfoStr) {\n      oauthToken = token;\n      userInfo = JSON.parse(userInfoStr);\n      return true;\n    }\n  } catch (e) {\n    console.error('Failed to load OAuth state:', e);\n  }\n  return false;\n};\n\n// Save OAuth state to localStorage\nconst saveOAuthState = (token, user) => {\n  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.TOKEN, token);\n  localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_INFO, JSON.stringify(user));\n  oauthToken = token;\n  userInfo = user;\n};\n\n// Clear OAuth state from localStorage\nconst clearOAuthState = () => {\n  localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEYS.TOKEN);\n  localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_INFO);\n  oauthToken = null;\n  userInfo = null;\n};\n\n// Update login UI based on OAuth state\nconst updateLoginUI = () => {\n  const loginBtn = document.getElementById('login-btn');\n  const userInfoDiv = document.getElementById('user-info');\n  const userAvatar = document.getElementById('user-avatar');\n  const userName = document.getElementById('user-name');\n  const userEmail = document.getElementById('user-email');\n\n  if (userInfo && oauthToken) {\n    // User is logged in\n    if (loginBtn) loginBtn.style.display = 'none';\n    if (userInfoDiv) userInfoDiv.style.display = 'flex';\n\n    // Update user info\n    if (userName) userName.textContent = userInfo.name || 'User';\n    if (userEmail) userEmail.textContent = userInfo.email || '';\n\n    // Set avatar (first letter of name)\n    if (userAvatar) {\n      const firstLetter = (userInfo.name || 'U').charAt(0).toUpperCase();\n      userAvatar.textContent = firstLetter;\n    }\n  } else {\n    // User is not logged in\n    if (loginBtn && typeof OAUTH_CONFIGURED !== 'undefined' && OAUTH_CONFIGURED) {\n      loginBtn.style.display = 'inline-flex';\n    }\n    if (userInfoDiv) userInfoDiv.style.display = 'none';\n  }\n};\n\n// Handle OAuth login\nconst handleLogin = () => {\n  // Redirect to Google OAuth\n  const redirectUri = `${window.location.protocol}//${window.location.host}/auth/callback`;\n  window.location.href = `/auth/login?redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(redirectUri)}`;\n};\n\n// Handle OAuth logout\nconst handleLogout = () => {\n  clearOAuthState();\n  updateLoginUI();\n\n  // Disconnect if connected\n  if (connectionStatus && webRTC) {\n    webRTC.close();\n    updateUI(\"disconnected\");\n    connectionStatus = false;\n    resetCostState();\n  }\n};\n\n// Get WebSocket URL with auth headers\nconst getWebSocketUrl = () => {\n  const url = new URL(socketUrl);\n\n  // Add OAuth token if available\n  if (oauthToken) {\n    // We'll pass the token via WebSocket subprotocol or query param\n    // For now, we'll pass it as a query parameter (less secure but functional)\n    // In production, you'd want to pass it via WebSocket subprotocols\n    url.searchParams.set('token', oauthToken);\n  }\n\n  return url.toString();\n};\n\n// Update mute button UI (both main and inline)\nconst updateMuteUI = (muted) => {\n  // Main controls\n  const muteBtn = document.getElementById('mute-btn');\n  const muteIcon = document.getElementById('mute-icon');\n  const muteText = document.getElementById('mute-text');\n  // Inline controls\n  const muteBtnInline = document.getElementById('mute-btn-inline');\n  const muteIconInline = document.getElementById('mute-icon-inline');\n  const muteTextInline = document.getElementById('mute-text-inline');\n\n  const icon = muted ? '🔇' : '🔊';\n  const text = muted ? 'Unmute' : 'Mute';\n\n  if (muteBtn) {\n    if (muted) {\n      muteBtn.classList.add('muted');\n    } else {\n      muteBtn.classList.remove('muted');\n    }\n  }\n  if (muteIcon) muteIcon.textContent = icon;\n  if (muteText) muteText.textContent = text;\n\n  // Update inline controls\n  if (muteBtnInline) {\n    if (muted) {\n      muteBtnInline.classList.add('muted');\n    } else {\n      muteBtnInline.classList.remove('muted');\n    }\n  }\n  if (muteIconInline) muteIconInline.textContent = icon;\n  if (muteTextInline) muteTextInline.textContent = text;\n};\n\n// Update push-to-talk button UI (both main and inline)\nconst updatePTTUI = (enabled) => {\n  console.log('updatePTTUI called with enabled:', enabled);\n  // Main controls\n  const pttToggle = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle');\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttHint = document.querySelector('.ptt-hint');\n  // Inline controls\n  const pttToggleInline = document.getElementById('ptt-toggle-inline');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n\n  if (pttToggle) pttToggle.checked = enabled;\n  if (pttToggleInline) pttToggleInline.checked = enabled;\n\n  // Main PTT button\n  if (pttBtn) {\n    if (enabled) {\n      pttBtn.classList.remove('hidden');\n      pttBtn.style.display = 'flex';\n    } else {\n      pttBtn.classList.add('hidden');\n      pttBtn.style.display = 'none';\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Inline PTT button\n  if (pttBtnInline) {\n    if (enabled) {\n      pttBtnInline.classList.remove('hidden');\n      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'flex';\n    } else {\n      pttBtnInline.classList.add('hidden');\n      pttBtnInline.style.display = 'none';\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Show/hide the hint\n  if (pttHint) {\n    pttHint.style.display = enabled ? 'block' : 'none';\n  }\n};\n\n// Set microphone enabled state\nconst setMicrophoneEnabled = (enabled) => {\n  console.log('setMicrophoneEnabled called:', enabled, 'webRTC:', !!webRTC);\n  if (webRTC) {\n    console.log('webRTC.microphone:', webRTC.microphone);\n    if (webRTC.microphone) {\n      webRTC.microphone.enabled = enabled;\n      console.log(`Microphone ${enabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'}`);\n    } else {\n      console.warn('webRTC.microphone not available');\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Toggle mute state\nconst toggleMute = () => {\n  console.log('toggleMute clicked, webRTC:', !!webRTC, 'connectionStatus:', connectionStatus);\n\n  // Allow toggling state even without connection (will apply on connect)\n  isMuted = !isMuted;\n  updateMuteUI(isMuted);\n  saveMuteState(isMuted);\n  console.log(`Mute state toggled to: ${isMuted}`);\n\n  // Apply immediately if connected\n  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n    setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n  }\n};\n\n// Toggle push-to-talk mode\nconst togglePushToTalk = () => {\n  console.log('togglePushToTalk clicked, current state:', isPushToTalk);\n\n  isPushToTalk = !isPushToTalk;\n  updatePTTUI(isPushToTalk);\n  savePushToTalkState(isPushToTalk);\n  console.log(`Push-to-talk mode toggled to: ${isPushToTalk}`);\n\n  // Apply immediately if connected\n  if (webRTC && webRTC.microphone) {\n    if (isPushToTalk) {\n      // Entering PTT mode - disable mic by default\n      setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n    } else {\n      // Leaving PTT mode - restore based on mute state\n      setMicrophoneEnabled(!isMuted);\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Push-to-talk button handlers\nconst startTalking = () => {\n  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.add('active');\n  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.add('active');\n  setMicrophoneEnabled(true);\n  console.log('PTT: Started talking');\n};\n\nconst stopTalking = () => {\n  if (!isPushToTalk || !webRTC || !webRTC.microphone) return;\n\n  const pttBtn = document.getElementById('ptt-btn');\n  const pttBtnInline = document.getElementById('ptt-btn-inline');\n  if (pttBtn) pttBtn.classList.remove('active');\n  if (pttBtnInline) pttBtnInline.classList.remove('active');\n  setMicrophoneEnabled(false);\n  console.log('PTT: Stopped talking');\n};\n\n// Update layout based on chat history (desktop: show inline controls when has content)\nconst updateLayoutMode = (hasHistory) => {\n  const mainContent = document.querySelector('.main-content');\n  if (mainContent) {\n    if (hasHistory) {\n      mainContent.classList.add('has-history');\n    } else {\n      mainContent.classList.remove('has-history');\n    }\n  }\n};\n\n// Transcript display functions\nconst showTranscript = () => {\n  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n  // Only show and switch layout when there's actual content (not empty placeholders)\n  const hasVisibleContent = transcriptMessages.some(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming);\n  if (card && hasVisibleContent) card.classList.add('visible');\n  updateLayoutMode(hasVisibleContent);\n};\n\nconst hideTranscript = () => {\n  const card = document.getElementById('transcript-card');\n  if (card) card.classList.remove('visible');\n  updateLayoutMode(false);\n};\n\nconst clearTranscript = () => {\n  transcriptMessages = [];\n  renderTranscript();\n  updateLayoutMode(false);\n};\n\n// Find message by itemId\nconst findMessageByItemId = (itemId) => {\n  return transcriptMessages.findIndex(msg => msg.itemId === itemId);\n};\n\n// Create placeholder for conversation item (called when item is created - correct order)\nconst createMessagePlaceholder = (itemId, role) => {\n  // Check if already exists\n  if (findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) return;\n  transcriptMessages.push({\n    itemId,\n    role,\n    content: '',\n    timestamp: Date.now(),\n    pending: true  // Mark as waiting for transcription\n  });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Update message content by itemId\nconst updateMessageByItemId = (itemId, content, options = {}) => {\n  const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n  if (index !== -1) {\n    transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n    transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n    if (options.streaming !== undefined) {\n      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = options.streaming;\n    }\n    renderTranscript();\n    showTranscript();\n    return index;\n  }\n  return -1;\n};\n\n// Format tool name for display\nconst formatToolName = (name) => {\n  const displayNames = {\n    get_current_weather: 'Weather',\n    web_search: 'Web Search',\n    web_fetch: 'Fetch URL',\n    voice_change: 'Voice Change',\n    save_memory: 'Save Memory',\n    recall_memories: 'Recall Memories'\n  };\n  return displayNames[name] || name.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\\b\\w/g, l => l.toUpperCase());\n};\n\n// Add a tool call message to the transcript\nconst addToolCallMessage = (name, args, callId) => {\n  transcriptMessages.push({\n    role: 'tool',\n    type: 'tool_call',\n    toolName: name,\n    toolArgs: args,\n    callId: callId,\n    status: 'pending',\n    result: null,\n    timestamp: Date.now(),\n    justAdded: true // Flag for initial animation\n  });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Legacy function for messages without itemId\nconst addTranscriptMessage = (role, content, itemId = null) => {\n  if (itemId) {\n    const index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n    if (index !== -1) {\n      // Update existing placeholder\n      transcriptMessages[index].content = content;\n      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n      renderTranscript();\n      showTranscript();\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n  // Fallback: add new message\n  transcriptMessages.push({ role, content, timestamp: Date.now(), itemId });\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n};\n\n// Start a new streaming response (returns index)\nconst startStreamingResponse = (role, itemId = null) => {\n  let index;\n  if (itemId) {\n    index = findMessageByItemId(itemId);\n    if (index !== -1) {\n      // Use existing placeholder\n      transcriptMessages[index].streaming = true;\n      transcriptMessages[index].pending = false;\n    } else {\n      // Create new with itemId\n      index = transcriptMessages.length;\n      transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true, itemId });\n    }\n  } else {\n    index = transcriptMessages.length;\n    transcriptMessages.push({ role, content: '', timestamp: Date.now(), streaming: true });\n  }\n  streamingResponse = { index, content: '', role, itemId };\n  renderTranscript();\n  showTranscript();\n  return index;\n};\n\n// Append to streaming response\nconst appendToStreamingResponse = (delta) => {\n  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n  streamingResponse.content += delta;\n  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = streamingResponse.content;\n  renderTranscript(true); // Pass true to indicate streaming update\n};\n\n// Finalize streaming response\nconst finalizeStreamingResponse = (finalContent) => {\n  if (!streamingResponse) return;\n  // Use final content if provided, otherwise keep accumulated content\n  if (finalContent) {\n    transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].content = finalContent;\n  }\n  transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index].streaming = false;\n  streamingResponse = null;\n  renderTranscript();\n};\n\nconst renderTranscript = (isStreamingUpdate = false) => {\n  const container = document.getElementById('transcript-content');\n  if (!container) return;\n\n  if (transcriptMessages.length === 0) {\n    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // For streaming updates, only update the streaming message's text (much faster)\n  if (isStreamingUpdate && streamingResponse) {\n    const streamingEl = container.querySelector(`[data-idx=\"${streamingResponse.index}\"] .transcript-text`);\n    if (streamingEl) {\n      const msg = transcriptMessages[streamingResponse.index];\n      let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n      // Simple text for streaming - skip markdown parsing for performance\n      contentHtml = contentHtml.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n      streamingEl.innerHTML = contentHtml;\n      container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Full render for new messages or finalization\n  // Filter out pending placeholders with no content (always include tool_call messages)\n  const visibleMessages = transcriptMessages.filter(msg => msg.content || msg.streaming || msg.type === 'tool_call');\n\n  if (visibleMessages.length === 0) {\n    container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"transcript-empty\">Conversation transcript will appear here...</div>';\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const html = visibleMessages.map((msg, idx) => {\n    // Tool call messages — collapsed by default, expand to see request + response\n    if (msg.type === 'tool_call') {\n      let argsFormatted = msg.toolArgs || '';\n      try {\n        argsFormatted = JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(msg.toolArgs), null, 2);\n      } catch (e) { /* keep raw */ }\n\n      const statusClass = msg.status === 'completed' ? 'completed' : 'pending';\n\n      // Tool-specific icons\n      const toolIcons = {\n        get_current_weather: '🌤️',\n        web_search: '🔍',\n        web_fetch: '📄',\n        voice_change: '🎙️',\n        save_memory: '💾',\n        recall_memories: '🧠'\n      };\n      const toolIcon = toolIcons[msg.toolName] || '🔧';\n\n      // Format timestamp\n      const time = new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });\n\n      // Response section inside the expandable body\n      let resultHtml = '';\n      if (msg.result) {\n        resultHtml = `\n          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n            <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Response</div>\n            <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${msg.result}</pre>\n          </div>`;\n      } else if (msg.status === 'pending') {\n        resultHtml = `\n          <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n            <span class=\"tool-call-loading\">Waiting for result...</span>\n          </div>`;\n      }\n\n      const justAdded = msg.justAdded ? 'data-just-added=\"true\"' : '';\n      const justCompleted = msg.justCompleted ? 'data-just-completed=\"true\"' : '';\n\n      return `\n        <div class=\"transcript-message tool-call\" data-idx=\"${idx}\" ${justAdded} ${justCompleted}>\n          <details class=\"tool-call-details\" ${msg.justAdded ? 'open' : ''}>\n            <summary class=\"tool-call-summary\">\n              <span class=\"tool-call-icon ${msg.toolName}\">${toolIcon}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-name\">${formatToolName(msg.toolName)}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-timestamp\">${time}</span>\n              <span class=\"tool-call-status ${statusClass}\">${msg.status}</span>\n            </summary>\n            <div class=\"tool-call-body\">\n              <div class=\"tool-call-section\">\n                <div class=\"tool-call-section-label\">Request</div>\n                <pre class=\"tool-call-section-text\">${argsFormatted}</pre>\n              </div>\n              ${resultHtml}\n            </div>\n          </details>\n        </div>\n      `;\n    }\n\n    const roleClass = msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'system' : 'assistant';\n    const roleLabel = msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : msg.role === 'system' ? 'System' : 'DUCK-E';\n    const streamingClass = msg.streaming ? ' streaming' : '';\n\n    // Parse markdown if marked is available (skip for empty streaming)\n    let contentHtml = msg.content || '';\n    if (contentHtml && typeof marked !== 'undefined' && !msg.streaming) {\n      try {\n        contentHtml = marked.parse(msg.content);\n      } catch (e) {\n        console.warn('Markdown parsing failed:', e);\n        contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n      }\n    } else if (contentHtml) {\n      contentHtml = msg.content.replace(/\\n/g, '<br>');\n    }\n\n    // Show cursor for streaming messages\n    if (msg.streaming) {\n      contentHtml += '<span class=\"streaming-cursor\">▋</span>';\n    }\n\n    return `\n      <div class=\"transcript-message ${roleClass}${streamingClass}\" data-idx=\"${idx}\">\n        <div class=\"transcript-label\">${roleLabel}</div>\n        <div class=\"transcript-text\">${contentHtml}</div>\n      </div>\n    `;\n  }).join('');\n\n  container.innerHTML = html;\n\n  // Auto-scroll to bottom\n  container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight;\n};\n\n// Handle incoming messages from WebRTC for transcript\nconst handleWebRTCMessage = (event) => {\n  try {\n    // event now has { data: string, message: object } from our modified ag2client\n    const data = event.message || (typeof event.data === 'string' ? JSON.parse(event.data) : event.data);\n\n    // Perf telemetry hooks\n    if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_started') {\n      perfReset();\n      perfTimeline.speechStarted = perfTs();\n      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_started ts=${perfTimeline.speechStarted.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n    } else if (data.type === 'input_audio_buffer.speech_stopped') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.speechStopped = perfTs();\n        const delta = perfTimeline.speechStopped - (perfTimeline.speechStarted ?? perfTimeline.speechStopped);\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] speech_stopped  speech_dur=${delta.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.transcriptionDone = perfTs();\n        const start = perfTimeline.speechStopped ?? perfTimeline.speechStarted;\n        const delta = start != null ? perfTimeline.transcriptionDone - start : null;\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] transcription_done  transcription_dur=${delta != null ? delta.toFixed(0) : '?'}ms`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.created') {\n      if (!perfTimeline) perfReset();\n      perfTimeline.responseCreated = perfTs();\n      console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] response.created ts=${perfTimeline.responseCreated.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        const callId = data.call_id;\n        perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId] = { name: data.name, dispatched: perfTs(), resultReceived: null };\n        console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_dispatched  tool=${data.name} call_id=${callId}`);\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline && data.item?.type === 'function_call') {\n        const callId = data.item.call_id;\n        if (perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId]) {\n          perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived = perfTs();\n          const dur = perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].resultReceived - perfTimeline.toolCalls[callId].dispatched;\n          console.log(`[DUCK-E Perf] tool_result_received  tool=${data.item.name} call_id=${callId} dur=${dur.toFixed(0)}ms`);\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n      if (perfTimeline) {\n        perfTimeline.responseDone = perfTs();\n        perfLogSummary();\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Log message types for debugging (can be removed later)\n    if (data.type) {\n      console.log('WebRTC message type:', data.type);\n    }\n\n    // Handle different message types from OpenAI Realtime API\n\n    // Conversation item created - create placeholder in correct order\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'conversation.item.added'; older models use 'conversation.item.created'\n    if (data.type === 'conversation.item.created' || data.type === 'conversation.item.added') {\n      const item = data.item;\n      if (item && item.id && item.role) {\n        console.log('Conversation item created:', item.id, item.role);\n        createMessagePlaceholder(item.id, item.role);\n      }\n    }\n    // User's speech transcription completed - update placeholder by item_id\n    else if (data.type === 'conversation.item.input_audio_transcription.completed') {\n      if (data.transcript) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        console.log('User transcript:', data.transcript, 'itemId:', itemId);\n        currentTurnUserTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = ''; // Reset assistant side for new turn\n        if (itemId && findMessageByItemId(itemId) !== -1) {\n          updateMessageByItemId(itemId, data.transcript);\n        } else {\n          // Fallback if no placeholder exists\n          addTranscriptMessage('user', data.transcript, itemId);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's audio response transcript DELTA (streaming)\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.delta'\n    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.delta' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.delta') {\n      if (data.delta) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'audio_transcript' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'audio_transcript';\n        }\n        appendToStreamingResponse(data.delta);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's audio response transcript completed\n    // gpt-realtime-2 uses 'response.output_audio_transcript.done'; older models use 'response.audio_transcript.done'\n    else if (data.type === 'response.audio_transcript.done' || data.type === 'response.output_audio_transcript.done') {\n      const itemId = data.item_id;\n      if (data.transcript) {\n        currentTurnAssistantTranscript = data.transcript; // Capture for memory extraction\n      }\n      if (streamingResponse && streamingResponse.type === 'audio_transcript') {\n        // Finalize with the complete transcript\n        finalizeStreamingResponse(data.transcript);\n      } else if (data.transcript) {\n        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n        console.log('Assistant transcript:', data.transcript);\n        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.transcript, itemId);\n      }\n    }\n    // Assistant's text response DELTA (streaming)\n    else if (data.type === 'response.text.delta') {\n      if (data.delta) {\n        const itemId = data.item_id;\n        // Start streaming if not already or if different item\n        if (!streamingResponse || streamingResponse.type !== 'text' || streamingResponse.itemId !== itemId) {\n          startStreamingResponse('assistant', itemId);\n          if (streamingResponse) streamingResponse.type = 'text';\n else if (data.text) {\n        // No streaming was happening, add as complete message\n        console.log('Assistant text:', data.text);\n        addTranscriptMessage('assistant', data.text, itemId);\n      }\n    }\n    // Function call arguments complete - display tool call card in transcript\n    else if (data.type === 'response.function_call_arguments.done') {\n      const name =   if (transcriptMessages[idx]) {\n            transcriptMessages[idx].justCompleted = false;\n          }\n        }, 500);\n      }\n    }\n    // Output item done - mark matching tool call as completed\n    else if (data.type === 'response.output_item.done') {\n      const item = data.item;\n      if (item && item.type === 'function_call') {\n        const idx = setTimeout(() => {\n            const msg = transcriptMessages[idx];\n            if (msg) msg.justCompleted = false;\n          }, 1000);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    // Response cancelled or interrupted - finalize any streaming\n    else if (data.type === 'response.cancelled' || data.type === 'response.done') {\n      if (streamingResponse) {\n        finalizeStreamingResponse();\n      }\n      if (data.type === 'response.done') {\n        // Accumulate token costs from response.done usage data\n        if (data.response?.usage) {\n the WebRTC data channel (forwarded via WebSocket), executes registered Python functions, and sends results back\n35\t4. **WebSocket lifecycle** — Manages accept/close and message routing\n36\t\n37\t### Security Issue: API Key Exposure\n38\t\n39\t**The current design leaks the OpenAI API key to the frontend.** In `ag2client.js`, the ephemeral key flow works correctly (the *ephemeral* client secret is sent to the browser, not the real API key). However, the `RealtimeSession` must ensure:\n40\t\n41\t1. The real `OPENAI_API_KEY` is **never** included in any WebSocket message to the client\n42\t2. Only the ephemeral `client_secret` from `/v1/realtime/sessions` is sent in the init message\n43\t3. The `config` object sent to the client must be stripped of any `api_key` fields before transmission\n44\t\n45\tThe ephemeral key endpoint returns a response like:\n46\t```json\n47\t{\n48\t  \"id\": \"sess_...\",\n49\t  \"client_secret\": {\"value\": \"ek_...\", \"expires_at\": 1234567890},\n50\t  \"model\": \"gpt-realtime-2\",\n51\t  ...\n52\t}\n53\t```\n54\t\n55\tOnly `client_secret.value` and `model` should reach the client. The `RealtimeSession` must explicitly construct a sanitized config object rather than forwarding the raw API response.\n56\t\n57\t### Replacement Strategy\n58\t\n59\tReplace `RealtimeAgent` with a custom `RealtimeSession` class (~150 lines) that:\n60\t\n61\t1. Calls `POST https://api.openai.com/v1/realtime/sessions` **server-side** with the real API key to obtain an ephemeral client secret\n62\t2. Constructs a **sanitized** init message containing only the ephemeral key and model — never the real API key\n63\t3. Sends the init message over the WebSocket to the client\n64\t4. Listens for incoming WebSocket messages containing `function_call` / `function_call_output` types\n65\t5. Dispatches tool calls to registered handler functions\n66\t6. Returns results back through the WebSocket → data channel path\n67\t\n68\t### Files to Modify\n69\t\n70\t| File | Change |\n71\t|------|--------|\n72\t| `requirements.txt` | Remove `ag2==0.9.10` `RealtimeSession` class |\n75\t| `app/realtime_session.py` | **NEW** — Custom `RealtimeSession` implementation |\n76\t| `app/website_files/static/ag2client.js` | Rename references from `ag2` to `ducke`, update `ag2.init` → `ducke.init` message type (or keep compatible) |\n77\t\n78\t### Implementation Details for `RealtimeSession`\n79\t\n80\t```python\n81\tclass RealtimeSession:\n82\t    def DUCK-E Modernization Plan\n\n## Current State Summary\n\nDUCK-E is a real-time voice assistant built on:\n- **Backend**: FastAPI (Python) with AG2 (AutoGen) `RealtimeAgent` for orchestrating OpenAI Realtime API sessions\n- **Frontend**: Vanilla JS + WebRTC via bundled `ag2client.js`\n- **Model**: `gpt-realtime` (configured via AG2's `config_list` system)\n- **Tools**: Weather (current + forecast via WeatherAPI), Web Search (via OpenAI Responses API), Web Fetch (planned — fetch and extract content from a URL)\n- **Auth**: Skeleton JWT middleware exists but no OAuth provider is integrated\n- **No memory system** exists today\n\n### Key AG2 Touchpoints\n| File | AG2 Usage |\n|------|-----------|\n| `requirements.txt` | `ag2==0.9.10` dependency |\n| `app/main.py:1` | `from autogen.agentchat.realtime_agent import RealtimeAgent` |\n| `app/main.py:288-294` | `RealtimeAgent(name, system_message, llm_config, websocket, logger)` |\n| `app/main.py:314-441` | `@realtime_agent.register_realtime_function()` decorators (3 tools) |\n| `app/main.py:444` | `await realtime_agent.run()` — the main session loop |\n| `app/config.py` | `generate_oai_config_list()` with AG2 tag-based filtering |\n| `app/website_files/static/ag2client.js` | Bundled client — WebRTC+WebSocket bridge, handles `ag2.init` message type |\n\n---\n\n## Change 1: Remove AG2 Dependency Entirely\n\n### What AG2 `RealtimeAgent` Actually Does\n\nBy reading `ag2client.js` and tracing the backend, `RealtimeAgent` provides:\n\n1. **Ephemeral key generation** — Calls OpenAI's `/v1/realtime/sessions` to get a short-lived client secret\n2. **Session configuration** — Sends an `ag2.init` message over WebSocket containing the ephemeral key, model name, and init chunks (system message, tool definitions, session config)\n3. **Tool call relay** — Receives `function_call` messages from the WebRTC data channel (forwarded via WebSocket), executes registered Python functions, and sends results back\n4. **WebSocket lifecycle** — Manages accept/close and message routing\n\n### Security Issue: API Key Exposure\n\n**The current design leaks the OpenAI API key to the frontend.** In `ag2client.js`, the ephemeral key flow works correctly (the *ephemeral* client secret is sent to the browser, not the real API key). However, the `RealtimeSession` must ensure:\n\n1. The real `OPENAI_API_KEY` is **never** included in any WebSocket message to the client\n2. Only the ephemeral `client_secret` from `/v1/realtime/sessions` is sent in the init message\n3. The `config` object sent to the client must be stripped of any `api_key` fields before transmission\n\nThe ephemeral key endpoint returns a response like:\n```json\n{\n  \"id\": \"sess_...\",\n  \"client_secret\": {\"value\": \"ek_...\", \"expires_at\": 1234567890},\n  \"model\": \"gpt-realtime-2\",\n  ...\n}\n```\n\nOnly `client_secret.value` and `model` should reach the client. The `RealtimeSession` must explicitly construct a sanitized config object rather than forwarding the raw API response.\n\n### Replacement Strategy\n\nReplace `RealtimeAgent` with a custom `RealtimeSession` class (~150 lines) that:\n\n1. Calls `POST https://api.openai.com/v1/realtime/sessions` **server-side** with the real API key to obtain an ephemeral client secret\n2. Constructs a **sanitized** init message containing only the ephemeral key and model — never the real API key\n3. Sends the init message over the WebSocket to the client\n4. Listens for incoming WebSocket messages containing `function_call` / `function_call_output` types\n5. Dispatches tool calls to registered handler functions\n6. Returns results back through the WebSocket → data channel path\n\n### Files to Modify\n\n| File | Change |\n|------|--------|\n| `requirements.txt` | Remove `ag2==0.9.10` |\n| `app/config.py` | Simplify — remove tag-based filtering, just provide `{model, api_key}` dicts directly |\n| `app/main.py` | Replace `RealtimeAgent` import and usage with new `RealtimeSession` class |\n| `app/realtime_session.py` | **NEW** — Custom `RealtimeSession` implementation |\n| `app/website_files/static/ag2client.js` | Rename references from `ag2` to `ducke`, update `ag2.init` → `ducke.init` message type (or keep compatible) |\n\n### Implementation Details for `RealtimeSession`\n\n```python\nclass RealtimeSession:\n    def __init__(self, websocket, model, api_key, system_message, tools, voice=\"alloy\", logger=None):\n        self.websocket = websocket\n        self.model = model\n        self.api_key = api_key\n        self.system_message = system_message\n        self.tools = tools  # List of tool definitions\n        self.tool_handlers = {}  # name -> callable\n        self.voice = voice\n        self.logger = logger\n\n    def register_tool(self, name, description, handler, parameters):\n        \"\"\"Register a tool function (replaces @register_realtime_function)\"\"\"\n        self.tool_handlers[name] = handler\n        self.tools.append({\n            \"type\": \"function\",\n            \"name\": name,\n            \"description\": description,\n            \"parameters\": parameters\n        })","numLines":100,"startLine":1,"totalLines":986}}}
